title: Comments Considered Manifest
description: Structured block embedded at the END of every agent's output. Validated by runner.py per FR-028 before the contribution is committed to the activity feed.

dispatch_id.description: ULID matching the runner's dispatch record for this call. Bogus IDs are rejected (FR-028).

feed_snapshot_at.description: ISO timestamp of the feed version this agent saw. Used by FR-033 to detect concurrent races.

items.description: One entry per non-trivial feed item the agent considered.

feed_item_id.description: Must resolve to a real entry in the project's activity.jsonl at or before feed_snapshot_at (FR-028).

truncation_acknowledged.description: If the agent's input context included a '[truncated N earlier items]' marker, this MUST be true. Otherwise false. (FR-031).
